scripts.build: bun run build:jjplan && bun run build:jjask
scripts.build:jjplan: mkdir -p dist && bun build src/main.ts --compile --target=bun-darwin-arm64 --define JJPLAN_VERSION=$(bun -p "JSON.stringify(require('fs').readFileSync('../VERSION','utf8').trim())") --define JJPLAN_ENTRY='"jjplan"' --outfile dist/jjplan-macos-arm64
scripts.build:jjask: mkdir -p dist && bun build src/main.ts --compile --target=bun-darwin-arm64 --define JJPLAN_VERSION=$(bun -p "JSON.stringify(require('fs').readFileSync('../VERSION','utf8').trim())") --define JJPLAN_ENTRY='"jjask"' --outfile dist/jjask-macos-arm64
scripts.build:local: bun run build:local:jjplan && bun run build:local:jjask
scripts.build:local:jjplan: mkdir -p $HOME/.local/bin && bun build src/main.ts --compile --define JJPLAN_VERSION=$(bun -p "JSON.stringify(require('fs').readFileSync('../VERSION','utf8').trim())") --define JJPLAN_ENTRY='"jjplan"' --outfile $HOME/.local/bin/jjplan
scripts.build:local:jjask: mkdir -p $HOME/.local/bin && bun build src/main.ts --compile --define JJPLAN_VERSION=$(bun -p "JSON.stringify(require('fs').readFileSync('../VERSION','utf8').trim())") --define JJPLAN_ENTRY='"jjask"' --outfile $HOME/.local/bin/jjask
